LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT YING FONG'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 877. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT YING FONG'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED.
